eval_results.name: single-module-grouping
eval_results.key_finding: Correctly grouped 3 files into 2 groups: auth implementation and tests

eval_results.name: cross-module-grouping
eval_results.key_finding: Identified 4 modules, created 3 commit groups with shared types as dependency group

eval_results.name: commit-message-format
eval_results.key_finding: Generated feat(auth): header with body, subject length within 50 chars, no trailing period

eval_results.name: dependency-ordering
eval_results.key_finding: Shared types committed first, implementation before tests, dependency rationale explained

eval_results.name: large-changeset-analysis
eval_results.key_finding: Successfully analyzed 22-file changeset, produced 5-group structured plan with total commit summary

grouping_algorithm.description: AI-DDD commit grouping based on module boundaries and dependency analysis
principles: Group by module boundary (backend, frontend, shared, mobile)
Shared/types changes always in first commit group
Maximum 6 groups for changesets up to 50 files

strengths: Handles large changesets (20+ files) without degradation
recommendations: Test with actual git diff output from real repositories
Add edge cases for circular dependency detection
